methods.description: Process for using Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM) and Energy Dispersive Spectroscopy (EDS) to analyze organic and mineral material deposited on photovoltaic (PV) surfaces.

steps.description: SEM and EDS measurements were made to the central glass sample (with zero tilt angle) on the glass tree.
steps.searchable_summary: perform SEM and EDS measurements on glass sample

steps.description: The organic material found in the SEM was mainly pollen, identified by the Portuguese Society of Aerobiology.
steps.searchable_summary: identify organic material in SEM images

methods.description: Using ImageJ to analyze SEM images and determine characteristics of organic and mineral materials.

steps.description: Using ImageJ, the following characteristics of the organic material, as well as all the material in the SEM images were found: average diameter of organic material (O D), average diameter of all particles (A D), ratio percentage between organic and all material in terms of particle count (OA PNR), and ratio in percentage in terms of area (OA AR).
steps.searchable_summary: analyze SEM images with ImageJ to find material characteristics
